21 March 2026 Military News

Operations

Other Conflicts
News Reports

Current Operations

    Other Operations

    Operation Epic Fury / Operation Roaring Lion | Operation True Promise 4

  • US F-35 jet hit by Iran won't be operational anytime soon, pilot wounded: Report Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- A report has disclosed that the US military's advanced F-35 stealth fighter jet struck by Iranian air defense units, won't be able to resume operation anytime soon.

  • Iran's Chokehold On Hormuz And The Limits Of Military Force RFE/RL 21 Mar 2026 -- The Strait of Hormuz, a 33-kilometer-wide chokepoint through which roughly a third of the world's seaborne oil passes, is effectively closed to normal commercial traffic.
  • Iran fired ballistic missiles at US-UK base in Indian Ocean Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 21 Mar 2026 -- Iran launched two intermediate-range ballistic missiles toward Diego Garcia, a strategically vital joint US-UK military base in the Indian Ocean, the Wall Street Journal reported Friday.
  • Iranian Missile Hits Israel's Dimona - Report Sputnik 21 Mar 2026 -- The city of Dimona in southern Israel is home to the country's main nuclear facility.
  • Iran says Natanz nuclear enrichment complex hit again in US-Israeli attack Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 21 Mar 2026 -- Iran said its Natanz nuclear enrichment complex was targeted again in a US-Israeli attack on Saturday morning, according to a statement carried by the semi-official Tasnim News Agency.
  • Israel, US Attack Iran's Natanz Nuclear Facility, No Leaks Reported Sputnik 21 Mar 2026 -- Israel and the United States attacked the Natanz uranium enrichment facility in Iran on Saturday, with no leaks reported, the Atomic Energy Organization of Iran (AEOI) said.
  • True Promise 4: Iran and resistance axis ops. against US-Israeli assets on Mar. 21 Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- On Saturday, March 21, 2026, the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) and the Iranian Army conducted multiple operations as part of Operation True Promise 4, which was launched immediately after the US-Israeli coalition carried out an unprovoked act of aggression against the Islamic Republic of Iran on February 28.
  • IRGC targets US fighter jets' hangars, fuel depots at bases in UAE, Kuwait Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) says it has successfully targeted enemy fighter jet hangars and fuel storage facilities at the US bases of Ali Al-Salem and Al-Minhad.
  • Iran's Army destroys another invading drone over Tehran Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- The Iranian Army's Air Defense has targeted and eliminated another invading drone over the capital, Tehran.
  • IRGC deploys 'new offensive tactics' to wear down enemy forces in new wave of strikes Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has deployed "new offensive tactics" in the new phase of retaliatory strikes against the US and Israeli positions using super-heavy missiles.
  • IRGC hits another Israeli F-16 fighter jet with interceptor missile Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) says it has successfully intercepted a third Israeli fighter jet, an F-16, in the skies over central Iran.
  • Iran Army drones target Israeli military installations, fuel depots in occupied lands Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Republic of Iran Army has carried out a large-scale overnight operation, targeting Israeli military installations and fuel depots in the occupied territories, deploying advanced kamikaze drones.

  • Bahrain: US Patriot missile, not Iranian strike, caused March 9 blast over residential area Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- Bahraini authorities have held a US-built Patriot missile system responsible for an explosion over a residential neighborhood of the Persian Gulf kingdom earlier this month, which resulted in casualties.

  • US Issues License for Sale of Iranian Oil Loaded On Vessels As of March 20 Sputnik 21 Mar 2026 -- The US Treasury Department has issued a license for delivery and sale of Iranian crude oil and petroleum products loaded onto vessels as of March 20.
  • US Ready to Help Other Countries Guard Strait of Hormuz If Asked — Trump Sputnik 21 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald Trump said the United States is ready to assist other countries in guarding the Strait of Hormuz if asked.
  • Trump Considers 'Winding Down' War, Even As Reports Grow Of New Ground Troops RFE/RL 21 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald Trump said he is considering "winding down" military efforts in the Middle East, even as reports grow of thousands of US ground forces heading toward the region as the war with Iran enters its fourth week.
  • Trump signals possible wind-down of aggression against Iran despite unresolved Hormuz crisis Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald Trump has indicated he is considering scaling back the underway unprovoked aggression towards Iran, even as the crisis surrounding the Strait of Hormuz remains unresolved.

  • Iran's Missile Cap Died With Khamenei, Putting Europe Within Reach RFE/RL 21 Mar 2026 -- Iran for years maintained that it had capped its ballistic missile range at 2,000 kilometers.
  • Skies of occupied territories 'defenseless', says Speaker Qalibaf after Dimona strikes Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- Iran's top legislator says reports of significant damage caused to the city of Dimona in the central occupied territories following Iranian missile strikes point to the disempowerment of the Israeli defenses in the face of Iranian retaliation.
  • 'Enemy to be astonished': IRGC declares 'missile dominance' over occupied territories Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) Aerospace Force has declared "missile dominance" over the skies of the occupied territories as the war enters its 23rd day.
  • Iranian islands will be graveyards of 'child-killing' aggressors if invaded, warns IRGC Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) Navy commander has issued a stark warning to the United States and Israel, saying Iranian islands in the Persian Gulf will turn into graveyards for "child-killing aggressors" in case of a ground invasion.
  • Iran needs guarantees of no future aggression before it can agree to end war: Pezeshkian Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian says Tehran requests firm guarantees that no military aggression is ever launched against the country in the future before it can agree to end the war if the United States and Israel immediately stop the hostilities.
  • Iran's Foreign Minister Says Tehran Will Not Agree to Ceasefire With US, Israel Sputnik 21 Mar 2026 -- On February 28, the United States and Israel launched strikes on targets in Iran, including in Tehran, causing damage and civilian casualties. Iran responded by striking Israeli territory and US military facilities in the Middle East.
  • Conflicts among Muslim nations will only benefit Israel: Pezeshkian Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian says the Islamic Republic does not seek conflicts with Muslim countries which will only be beneficial to the Israeli regime.
  • Iran fighting for security of region, Muslims: Military spokesperson Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- Iran is not only defending itself in the face of the US-Israeli aggression, but it is fighting for the security of the entire region and all Muslims, says a spokesperson for the Iranian Armed Forces.
  • Araghchi: Iran has not closed Strait of Hormuz, imposed restrictions on vessels linked to aggressors Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says Iran has not closed the Strait of Hormuz but rather enacted restrictions on vessels linked to states involved in the US-Israeli war and at the same time is offering assistance to others amid serious security concerns.
  • Iran has no oil on international waters; US claim intended to lower prices: Oil Ministry Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Oil Ministry dismisses comments by US Treasury Secretary Scott Besant, who said Washington had temporarily eased sanctions to allow Tehran to sell crude "it has stored on the water."
  • Iran Has No Intention of Conflicting With Neighboring States - President Sputnik 21 Mar 2026 -- Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian said on Saturday in an address to neighboring Muslim countries that Iran has no intention of entering into conflict with its neighbors.
  • Iran Notifies IAEA of Attack on Natanz Nuclear Facility - Statement Sputnik 21 Mar 2026 -- Iran has notified the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) of an attack on its Natanz nuclear facility, the IAEA said on Saturday.
  • Iran warns UK it is putting British lives at risk by joining US-Israeli aggression Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says most Britons oppose involvement in the US-Israeli war on Iran, warning Prime Minister Keir Starmer of endangering British lives by allowing UK bases to be used in the aggression.

  • IAEA Urges 'Military Restraint' As Iran's Natanz Facility Hit, More Ground Troops Travel To Region RFE/RL 21 Mar 2026 -- The International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) has reiterated its call for restraint as Iran reported that its Natanz uranium enrichment facility had been hit on March 21, as US and Israeli strikes continued despite US President Donald Trump saying the day before that the war could be "winding down."
  • War in the Middle East: Iran nuclear facility hit as equivalent of 'one classroom of children' killed, wounded daily in Lebanon UN News 21 Mar 2026 -- More than 1,000 people have been killed and 2,584 injured in Lebanon since the start of the US-Israel war on Iran, UN officials said Saturday.

  • Comment by Foreign Ministry Spokeswoman Maria Zakharova on attacks against uranium enrichment facilities in Iran Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 21 Mar 2026
  • 'Blatant violation': Russia condemns US-Israeli attack on Iran's Natanz nuclear site Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- Russia has categorically denounced the unlawful US-Israeli airstrikes on Iran's Natanz nuclear enrichment facility on Saturday, warning that the attack risks catastrophic consequences for global nuclear safety.
  • Attack on Natanz Facility Blatant Violation of International Law - Russia's MFA Spox Sputnik 21 Mar 2026 -- The attack on the Natanz uranium enrichment facility in Iran is a blatant violation of international law, Russian Foreign Ministry spokeswoman Maria Zakharova said on Saturday.

  • Britain Says Cyprus Base Not Included In Deal With US Forces RFE/RL 21 Mar 2026 -- Britain said its Akrotiri airbase in Cyprus would not ⁠be involved in ⁠its new agreement with the United States to use UK bases.
  • UK agrees to let US use bases for strikes on Iranian sites targeting Strait of Hormuz Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 21 Mar 2026 -- The UK has approved an expansion of US access to British bases for operations targeting Iranian missile capabilities threatening shipping in the Strait of Hormuz, Downing Street has said.

  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Four Drones Intercepted and Destroyed in Eastern Region SPA 21 Mar 2026
  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Two Drones Intercepted and Destroyed in Eastern Region SPA 21 Mar 2026
  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: A Drone Intercepted and Destroyed in Eastern Region SPA 21 Mar 2026

  • G7 Foreign Ministers' statement on support to partners in the Middle East UK FCDO 21 Mar 2026 -- Joint Statement from the G7 Foreign Ministers of Canada, France, Germany, Italy, Japan, the UK, the USA and the High Representative of the EU.
  • The President and other leaders issued joint statement on the Strait of Hormuz President of the Republic of Lithuania 21 Mar 2026 -- President Gitanas Nausėda, together with the leaders of the United Kingdom, France, Germany, Italy, the Netherlands, Japan, Canada, the Republic of Korea, New Zealand, Denmark, Latvia, Slovenia, Estonia, Norway, Sweden, Finland, the Czech Republic, Romania, Bahrain, Australia, and the United Arab Emirates, issued a joint statement on the Strait of Hormuz on Saturday.
  • Grand Ayatollah Sistani issues stern condemnation of US-Israeli aggression on Iran Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- The top Muslim Shia cleric in Iraq has issued a statement strongly condemning the ongoing US-Israeli war on Iran.
  • Prime Minister speaks with the President of Iran India PIB 21 Mar 2026 -- Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi spoke with the President of the Islamic Republic of Iran, H.E. Dr. Masoud Pezeshkian, today, to discuss regional developments and strengthen bilateral cooperation.

Defense Policy / Programs

  • NATO relocates Iraq mission personnel to Europe amid Mideast escalation Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 21 Mar 2026 -- NATO has relocated all personnel from its mission in Iraq to Europe, the alliance said on Friday, citing a shift in operational posture amid the current hostilities in the Mideast.

  • The Aging Convicts And Female Prisoners Bolstering Ukraine's War Effort RFE/RL 21 Mar 2026 -- At an icy training ground in the east of Ukraine, a dozen female convicts are being prepared for drone missions on the front lines.

  • First live-fire surface-to-air missile launches by PLA Navy's Type 055 large destroyer captured in rare official media footage Global Times 21 Mar 2026 -- An official Chinese media report on Saturday released rare footage of the first live-fire surface-to-air missile launches by the Nanchang, the first Type 055 10,000 ton-class large destroyer of the Chinese People's Liberation Army (PLA) Navy, with all five missiles launched in the test hitting their targets. A Chinese military affairs expert said that the high accuracy demonstrated the Chinese warship's comprehensive capabilities, not only its surface-to-air missiles, but also its situational awareness.

  • Vice Minister Hsu Szu-chien Visits U.S. F-16 BLK70 Production Line - Witnesses Lockheed Martin's Completion of Acceptance Check Flight for the First Aircraft ROC MND 21 Mar 2026 -- The Ministry of National Defense stated today (March 21) that Vice Minister for Military Administration Hsu Szu-chien led a delegation on March 16 (Eastern Time), accompanied by Ambassador Alexander Tah-Ray Yui of the Taipei Economic and Cultural Representative Office in the United States, Air Force Deputy Chief of Staff Major General Tien Chung-yi, and Chief of the R.O.C Defense Mission to the United States Rear Admiral Wei Chung-hsing.
  • Taiwanese officials shown 1st F-16V jet due this year CNA 21 Mar 2026 -- Taiwanese officials were shown the first of 66 F-16V fighter jets purchased by Taiwan from the United States, the Ministry of National Defense said Saturday, adding that the aircraft has completed an initial flight test and is expected to be delivered later this year.
  • Submarine flaws minor, do not affect testing: Contractor CNA 21 Mar 2026 -- CSBC Corp., Taiwan, the main contractor for Taiwan's first domestically built submarine, has pledged to promptly address issues in the ship's interior highlighted by an opposition lawmaker Friday, but it did not expect ongoing tests to be affected.

  • Fire At Czech Arms Producer With Ukraine Ties Investigated As Terror Attack RFE/RL 21 Mar 2026 -- Czech authorities have launched a probe into a fire that broke out at a warehouse of a company that makes drones and other military equipment, including a new cruise missile it was reportedly planning to test in combat in Ukraine this year.

  • INDIAN NAVY SET TO COMMISSION ITS LATEST STEALTH FRIGATE 'TARAGIRI' India PIB 21 Mar 2026 -- In a ceremony that marks a defining moment for India's maritime sovereignty, the Indian Navy is preparing to commission its latest stealth Frigate, Taragiri (F41), on 03 Apr 2026
  • Modern-day warfare transcends borders, robust military supported by prepared citizens must to secure national interests: Raksha Mantri India PIB 21 Mar 2026 -- "Present-day warfare transcends borders, with national security encompassing economic, digital, energy, and even food security," said Raksha Mantri Shri Rajnath Singh as he underscored the need of a robust military supported by prepared citizens capable of standing shoulder-to-shoulder to protect the nation under any circumstances

  • PH, US complete maritime drills off Bataan, Manila Bay Philippine News Agency 21 Mar 2026 -- The Philippines and the United States have completed a bilateral maritime cooperative activity (MCA) in Manila Bay and waters off Mariveles, Bataan, the Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) said on Saturday.

Other Conflicts


    Ukraine Conflict News

    Operation Iron Swords / Operation Al-Aqsa Flood | Operation Northern Arrows | Giddeon's Chariots | Roaring Lion (Lebanon)

  • Hezbollah targets Israeli Filon base with missile amid aggression against Lebanon Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- Lebanese resistance movement Hezbollah says it has launched missiles against the occupying entity military base, Filon, south of Rosh Pinna illegal settlement.

  • No: 54, 21 March 2026, Regarding the Situation in the West Bank Republic of Turkey Ministry of Foreign Affairs 21 Mar 2026

    • Other Conflicts

  • PLA expels Philippine aircraft intruding into airspace over waters adjacent to China's Meiji Jiao Global Times 21 Mar 2026 -- Senior Captain Zhai Shichen, spokesperson for the PLA Southern Theater Command (STC), said that the naval and air forces of the PLA STC tracked and monitored a Type C-208 Philippine aircraft which intruded into the airspace over waters adjacent to Meiji Jiao of China's Nansha Qundao on Friday, issuing warnings to expel it in accordance with laws and regulations, according to a statement released by the PLA STC on its official WeChat account.

  • HE GCCSG Condemns & Denounces the Treacherous Israeli Aggression that Targeted Military Infrastructure in the South of the Brotherly Syrian Arab Republic Gulf Cooperation Council 21 Mar 2026
  • The General Secretariat of the OIC Strongly Condemns the Ongoing Israeli Aggression against the Syrian Arab Republic Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) 21 Mar 2026 -- The General Secretariat of the Organisation of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) has condemned in the strongest terms the blatant attack by the Israeli occupation forces on military infrastructure in the south of the Syrian Arab Republic
  • Iraqi resistance group vows harsh strikes on Syria's HTS positions if it hits Hezbollah Press TV 21 Mar 2026 -- An Iraqi anti-terror and resistance group has vowed to launch powerful strikes on the concentration positions of Syria's ruling Hay'at Tahrir al-Sham (HTS) forces in case they opt to launch acts of aggression against the Lebanese Hezbollah resistance movement.
  • Saudi Arabia Expresses its Strongest Condemnation of the Blatant Israeli Aggression Targeting Military Infrastructure in South of Syria SPA 21 Mar 2026 -- The Ministry of Foreign Affairs expressed the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia's strongest condemnation of the blatant Israeli aggression targeting military infrastructure in the south of the Syrian Arab Republic, describing it as a flagrant violation of international law and Syria's sovereignty

  • WHO verifies deadly hospital attack in war-torn Sudan UN News 21 Mar 2026 -- The World Health Organization (WHO) verified on Saturday a hospital attack in war-torn Sudan that killed 64 people.

News Reports

  • Тelephone conversation with President of Belarus Alexander Lukashenko President of Russia 21 Mar 2026 -- Vladimir Putin had a telephone conversation with President of the Republic of Belarus Alexander Lukashenko.
  • Excerpt from Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov's interview for Looking Back television programme hosted by Leonid Mlechin, Moscow, March 21, 2026 Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 21 Mar 2026

  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 21 Mar 2026

  • PM call with His Royal Highness Crown Prince Salman bin Hamad Al-Khalifa of Bahrain: 21 March 2026 Gov.UK 21 Mar 2026

  • Doorstop - Coburg Prime Minister of Australia 21 Mar 2026

  • Re-Election of Thai Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul US Dept. of State 21 Mar 2026 -- "The United States congratulates Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul on his re-election."
